data.title: Five Star Franchising has 2 brands on Top 200 Franchises list for owner support and satisfaction. (Total: 200)
data.description: Card My Yard and Five Star Bath Solutions have been recognized for their exceptional owner support and satisfaction, earning them a spot on a prestigious list. This news was unveiled by Five Star Franchising, a prominent platform hosting various home service franchise brands. The announcement was made on January 8, 2026 in Springville, Utah. This recognition highlights the remarkable dedication of Card My Yard and Five Star Bath Solutions towards their owners, showcasing their commitment to providing top-notch services.

data.title: Chipotle makes key leadership changes: Ilene Eskenazi now Chief Legal & HR Officer, Stephanie Perdue interim CMO. Reaffirms guidance.
data.description: Chipotle Mexican Grill recently announced the appointment of Ilene Eskenazi as the Chief Legal and Human Resources Officer. Stephanie Perdue, the Vice President of Brand Marketing, has been appointed as the Interim Chief Marketing Officer. The company confirmed its full-year 2025 guidance during the announcement. The news was disclosed in Newport Beach, California, on January 12, 2026.

data.title: Edgewell Personal Care Company [NYSE: EPC] to discuss Q1 fiscal 2026 results on Feb 9, 2026, in investor conference call.
data.description: Shelton, Connecticut - On January 12, 2026, Edgewell Personal Care Company, trading as EPC on the New York Stock Exchange, announced that they will release their financial figures for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026 before the market opens on February 9, 2026. The company will delve into their performance in an investor conference call following the release.

data.title: Hydro One (TSX: H) to release Q4 2025 results on Feb 13, 2026 before markets open. Teleconference at 8am ET.
data.description: Hydro One Limited, the leading electric transmission and distribution utility in Ontario, is scheduled to hold an investment community teleconference on February 13, 2026, at 8 a.m. ET. The company, listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under ticker symbol H, will announce its fourth quarter financial results on the morning of February 13.

data.title: Marriott International to release Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 10, 2026, at 7:00 am ET. Conference call for investors to follow.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Bethesda-headquartered Marriott International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MAR) announced the release of its fourth quarter 2025 earnings results scheduled for Tuesday, February 10, 2026, at around 7:00 a.m. Eastern Time (ET). The company plans to conduct a conference call for investors and analysts on that day.

data.title: Hormel Foods announces retirements of Mark Morey and Paul Peil, leaders in fresh pork ops.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Hormel Foods Corporation, a Fortune 500 global branded food company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol HRL, revealed that two long-serving executives are set to retire. Mark Morey, who currently serves as the vice president of operations for fresh pork, and Paul Peil, the vice president of [department name], will both be stepping down. This announcement marks a significant change within the company's leadership team.

data.title: Aberdeen Investments U.S. Closed-End Funds paid distributions on Jan. 12, 2026. Includes funds like ASGI, HQH, HQL, IFN, THQ.
data.description: Today, Aberdeen Investments U.S. Closed-End Funds (NYSE: ASGI, HQH, HQL, IFN, THQ) and NYSE American: IAF disclosed that on January 12, 2026, they paid out distributions as detailed in the table provided.

data.title: Option Care Health reported preliminary unaudited financial results for Q4 2025 & FY 2025, with net revenue between $5.645B to $5.655B for 2025. The company expects net revenue between $5.8B to $6.0B for FY 2026. Share repurchase program increased from $500 million to $1.0 billion in January 2026, repurchased $95 million of shares in Q4 2025 and $307 million during FY 2025. The company will participate in the 44th Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference. Forward-looking statements noted in the press release, preliminary unaudited financial data subject to change, non-GAAP financial measures provided.
data.description: Option Care Health, Inc. announced preliminary unaudited financial results for Q4 2025 and full year ended Dec 31, 2025. Q4 had net revenue of $1.46-1.47 billion, GAAP net income of $59.1-62.4 million, and adjusted EBITDA of $123.7-127.7 million. Full year 2025 saw net revenue of $5.645-5.655 billion, GAAP net income of $208.2-211.5 million, and adjusted EBITDA of $469-473 million, with cash flow below $320 million. The company's 2026 guidance includes net revenue of $5.8-6.0 billion and adjusted EBITDA of $480-505 million. The Board also increased the share repurchase program authorization to $1 billion on Jan 9, 2026, with $95 million of shares repurchased in Q4 2025 and $307 million during 2025. The company will be participating in the 44th Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference, with a presentation on Jan 13, 2026. Investors can access the presentation materials online. Note: Preliminary financial data are subject to completion procedures and may change. Non-GAAP measures like Adjusted net income and Adjusted EBITDA are also reported.

(NYSE: CNS) revealed that their preliminary assets under management as of December 31, 2025 stood at $90.5 billion, which marked a decline of $1.4 billion from the previous month's total of $91.9 billion as of November 30, 2025. data.title: Broadstone Net Lease plans to release Q4 2025 earnings and host a conference call in VICTOR, N.Y. via BUSINESS WIRE.
data.description: Victor, New York - Broadstone Net Lease has announced that they will be releasing their fourth quarter 2025 earnings report and hosting a conference call. This will allow stakeholders and investors to gain insights into the company's performance during this period. The call is set to provide a detailed overview of their financial results, acquisitions, and future plans. The event is expected to cover key figures such as revenue, profits, and any developments in their net lease portfolio. This initiative aims to enhance transparency and keep stakeholders informed about the company's progress.

data.title: Global company UVV releases 2025 Sustainability Report emphasizing commitment to sustainability. CEO highlights its strategic importance.
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia, Universal Corporation (NYSE:UVV), a worldwide agriproducts company, has unveiled its 2025 Sustainability Report. The company's Chairman, President, and CEO, Preston D. Wigner, emphasized sustainability as a key element of Universal's strategy for continued success. With a long-standing dedication to sustainability, Universal is integrating these practices into its global operations to enhance its position in the market.

data.title: FrontView REIT (NYSE: FVR) reveals Q4 2025 activity: 7 properties acquired for $41.3 million, showing 7.46% cash yield.
data.description: In Dallas, today, FrontView REIT (NYSE: FVR) shared updates on its investment activities for the fourth quarter and full-year of 2025. The company acquired 7 properties during the last quarter for a total purchase price of $41.3 million. These acquisitions are expected to provide a cash yield of 7.46% with a weighted average lease term of 13.1 years and annual escalators of 1.2%. Furthermore, the company has outlined its outlook for the first quarter of 2026, highlighting its acquisition pipeline. FrontView also revealed its enhanced transparency disclosures for its portfolio, aiming to lead in the sector.

data.title: NETSTREIT reports strong Q4 & FY 2025 - record $1.0 billion liquidity, low leverage, prefunded investment pipeline.
data.description: In Dallas, NETSTREIT Corp. (NYSE: NTST) shared details on its business performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company highlighted record gross investment activity in consecutive quarters, marking a positive end to the year. Currently, they boast over $1.0 billion in liquidity, and their leverage is below the targeted range. NETSTREIT also emphasized the strength of their investment grade balance sheet. Furthermore, the company mentioned a prefunded investment pipeline as part of their ongoing operations.

data.title: Stellantis highlights new vehicles and iconic returns at 2026 Detroit Auto Show. 2026 Jeep Cherokee showcased.
data.description: In Auburn Hills, Michigan on January 12, 2026, Jeep® unveiled the 2026 Jeep Cherokee as part of its growing range. Attendees are encouraged to test the renowned off-road abilities at the Camp Jeep ride-along exhibition. The new model is a testament to the brand's commitment to delivering exceptional performance. Additionally, Ram reiterates its dedication to impressive performance and capability with the revival of its legendary model.

data.title: Revvity (NYSE: RVTY) to share Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb 2, 2026. Phone conference at 8:00 am ET.
data.description: WALTHAM, Massachusetts - Revvity, Inc. revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for Q4 and the entire year of 2025 before the markets open on February 2, 2026. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 8:00 a.m. ET to delve into these figures, with the company's president and CEO Prahlad Singh along with CFO Max Krakowiak leading the discussion. Those interested can join the call through a live audio webcast accessible on the Inves platform.

data.title: Piedmont Realty Trust (NYSE: PDM) to release Q4 and annual 2025 financial results on Feb 11, 2026; conference call on Feb 12.
data.description: Piedmont Realty Trust (NYSE: PDM), based in Atlanta, GA, has disclosed plans to unveil its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year on February 11, 2026, post the end of trading on the NYSE. The company is scheduled to host a conference call on February 12, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET, which will be streamed live in listen-only mode on their investor relations website. The call will involve a comprehensive analysis by the management team regarding the performance in the mentioned periods, recent developments, and an interactive Q&A session.
